ab: ima ku hiya?
en: A: Who is he?

ab: hiya ga mama mu.
en: He is my uncle.

ab: nanu ku ki patawawan ni mama su?
ch: A:你的舅舅從事什麼工作?
en: A: What does your uncle do for a living?

ab: hiya ga Kinsat.
en: B: He’s a cop.

ab: ima ku hasa hiya?
en: A: Who is that guy?

ab: hiya ga basuyan mu kanayrin.
en: B: She’s my sister.

ab: kiyan patawawan ni basuyan su kanayrin?
en: A: Does your sister have a job?

ab: ki ma’umah yayuwaw na kuysang hiya.
en: B: She works in a hospital.

ab: sazing hi hasa ga matasaway aw?
ch: A:他們兩個人是兄弟姐妹嗎?
en: A: Are they brothers and sisters?

ab: ayat, laha ga masarawin.
en: B: No, they are friends.

ab: Yenzyumin su aw?
en: A: Are you Aboriginal?

ab: hu ga, kuzing ga Atayan ki.
en: B: Yes, I’m from [the Thayas].

ab: kanayrin su ga Yenzyumin aw?
en: A: Is your spouse Aboriginal?

ab: hu, sikila hiya ga Bunun.
en: B: Yes, but she’s Bunun.

ab: babawi yaba su pi?
en: A: Is your father very tall?

ab: hu, babawi sami kwara utux sali.
en: B: Yes, we are all very tall.

ab: niya miru laku saway su kanayrin la?
en: A: Does your sister go to school?

ab: hu, niya miru la.
en: B: Yes, she went to school.

ab: ba kamayan kayi Tayan ku saway su tamalung ru kanayrin aw?
en: A: Do your siblings speak the language?

ab: hu, ba kamayan kayi Tayan laha.
en: B: Yes, they speak the ethnic language.

ab: pisa kwara ku matasway su?
en: A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: tugan hi ku matasaway mu.
en: B: I have three brothers and sisters.

ab: magalu su maki ki yaba ru yaya aw?
ch: A:你和爸爸媽媽一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your parents?

ab: hu, niyan ku magalu maki ki yaba ru yaya mu.
ch: B:是，我和爸爸媽媽一起住。
en: B: Yes, I live with my mom and dad.

ab: magalu su maki ki yutas ru yaki aw?
ch: A:你和爺爺奶奶一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your grandparents?

ab: ini yu, ini kuzing pagalu maki ki yutas ru yaki mu.
ch: B:不，我沒和跟他們一起住。
en: B: No, I didn’t live with them.

ab: niyan su magalu maki ki ima?
en: A: Who do you live with?

ab: niya kuzing magalu maki ki yaba，yaya ru basuyan mu tamalung.
ch: B:我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥住在一起。
en: B: I live with my father, mother and brother.

ab: minkahun su inu?
en: A: Where are you from?

ab: minkahun kuzing i Bariy.
en: B: I’m from [Miaoli].

ab: niyan maki inu ku sali mamu?
en: A: Where is your home?

ab: ki maki i Bariy ku sali miyan.
en: B: Our home is in Miaoli.

ab: niyan inu ku alang su?
en: A:Where is your hometown?

ab: niyan maki i Liyung Paynux ku alang mu.
ch: B:我的故鄉在泰雅北勢群。
en: B: My hometown is in the northern region of Athens.

ab: niyan maki inu ku alang mamu?
en: A: Where is your tribe?

ab: niyan maki i Maybanan ku alang miyan.
ch: B:我們的部落在永安部落。
en: B: Our tribe is in Yongan.

ab: kanuwan ga mutu su musa alang?
ch: A:你什麼時候會回去部落?
en: A: When are you going back to the tribe?

ab: mahangi luyux i Abangan ga mutu kung musa i alang.
en: B: I will go back in the summer.

ab: kuzing ga la’i na Atayan.
en: B: I’m a Tayan child.
